formulas.name: Adjustment on Retiring Partner's Share
formulas.formula: Adjustment = (Retiring Partner's Share / Total Share) × New Profit
formulas.variables: Retiring Partner's Share: Amount the retiring partner is entitled to receive, Total Share: Total profit-sharing ratio, New Profit: New profit after the retirement
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the retiring partner's share in the profit after the retirement

formulas.name: Calculation of Goodwill on Retiring Partner's Share
formulas.formula: Goodwill = (2/3) × (New Profit × Average Profit × Number of Years)
formulas.variables: New Profit: New profit after the retirement, Average Profit: Average profit of the firm, Number of Years: Number of years for which the average profit is calculated
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the goodwill of the firm on the retiring partner's share

formulas.name: Adjustment on Intestate Death of a Partner
formulas.formula: Adjustment = (Deceased Partner's Share / Total Share) × New Profit
formulas.variables: Deceased Partner's Share: Amount the deceased partner was entitled to receive, Total Share: Total profit-sharing ratio, New Profit: New profit after the death of the partner
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the deceased partner's share in the profit after the death

formulas.name: Calculation of Goodwill on Deceased Partner's Share
formulas.formula: Goodwill = (2/3) × (New Profit × Average Profit × Number of Years)
formulas.variables: New Profit: New profit after the death of the partner, Average Profit: Average profit of the firm, Number of Years: Number of years for which the average profit is calculated
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the goodwill of the firm on the deceased partner's share

formulas.name: Adjustment for Interest on Partners' Capital
formulas.formula: Interest = (Capital × Rate of Interest × Time Period)
formulas.variables: Capital: Capital contributed by the partner, Rate of Interest: Interest rate, Time Period: Time period for which the interest is calculated
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the interest on partners' capital
